meta.title: K-pop Seoul Map
meta.subtitle: Discover BTS & K-pop spots in Seoul!

places.desc_en: BTS home base. Official merch available by reservation. The must-visit landmark for all K-pop fans.
places.desc_kr: BTS 소속사 본사. 예약제 굿즈 판매 운영. 팬 필수 방문지

places.desc_en: Cafe street behind HYBE building. Many fan event cafes during comebacks and birthdays.
places.desc_kr: 하이브 사옥 후문 카페 밀집 지역. 컴백/생일 팬 이벤트 카페 다수

places.desc_en: Fan cafe right next to HYBE. Hosts BTS & HYBE artist events. A warm space for all ARMY.
places.desc_kr: HYBE 앞 팬 카페. BTS/HYBE 아티스트 이벤트 진행. @bomnalcafe

places.desc_en: Jungkook visited right after the ARIRANG comeback concert (Mar 2026). Autograph confirmed on Instagram!
places.desc_kr: 정국이 ARIRANG 광화문 공연 후 방문 (2026.03). 인스타에 사인 공개

places.desc_en: Fan-run BTS themed restaurant near Yongsan. Filled with fan art, signed goods, and BTS playlists.
places.desc_kr: 팬이 운영하는 BTS 테마 식당. 팬아트, 사인 굿즈, BTS 플레이리스트

places.desc_en: BTS officially visited in 2020. Home of the Emille Bell — its sound is featured in ARIRANG album track 'No.29'.
places.desc_kr: BTS 공식 방문(2020). 성덕대왕신종 소장 — ARIRANG 앨범 'No.29'에 종소리 수록

places.desc_en: Large shopping mall connected to Yongsan Station. Great for shopping, dining, movies. Easy access for international fans.
places.desc_kr: 용산역 직결 대형 쇼핑몰. 쇼핑, 식사, 영화. 외국 팬 접근성 좋음

places.desc_en: Suga and Jimin visited this grilled intestine restaurant. A favorite late-night spot.
places.desc_kr: 슈가와 지민이 다녀간 막창 맛집

places.desc_en: Cultural complex on the Han River. Used as a BTS filming location.
places.desc_kr: 한강 위 문화복합공간. BTS 촬영지

places.desc_en: Iconic Seoul landmark. Featured BTS THE CITY media facade in 2026.
places.desc_kr: 서울 랜드마크. 2026 BTS THE CITY 미디어파사드 장소

places.desc_en: Japanese steamed cuisine restaurant run by Jin's older brother. Jin and J-Hope had a special meal here before Jin's enlistment.
places.desc_kr: 진의 형이 운영하는 일식당. 진과 제이홉이 입대 전 식사한 곳

places.desc_en: THE legendary restaurant from BTS trainee days. Walls covered with fan messages. ARMY pilgrimage #1 spot.
places.desc_kr: BTS 연습생 시절 단골 식당. 아미 성지순례 1순위

places.desc_en: Where BTS trained and debuted. Walls covered in fan messages from around the world. A true heritage site.
places.desc_kr: BTS 연습생 시절 사옥. 전세계 팬 메시지로 뒤덮인 외벽

places.desc_en: BTS members often came here during trainee days. Busking spot from 'Rookie King' EP7. Also appeared in Run BTS Telepathy episode.
places.desc_kr: 연습생 시절 자주 방문. 《신인왕 방탄소년단》7화 버스킹 장소. 달방 텔레파시 편

places.desc_en: BTS's 3rd dormitory converted into a gallery cafe. They lived here 2017-2019. ARMY pilgrimage spot.
places.desc_kr: BTS 3번째 숙소를 개조한 갤러리카페. 2017~2019 거주. 아미 성지

places.desc_en: Jungkook's regular pork neck BBQ spot. Also visited by many other Korean celebrities.
places.desc_kr: 정국 단골 목살 맛집. 다수 셀럽 인증

places.desc_en: Premium Korean beef tartare. Jungkook visited with the '97 line (NCT Jaehyun, Cha Eunwoo, Bang Chan).
places.desc_kr: 정국이 97즈(재현, 차은우, 방찬)와 방문한 한우 육회 전문점

places.desc_en: Premium 1++ Korean beef restaurant. Jungkook visited and tried their signature grilled beef.
places.desc_kr: 1++ 한우 정육식당. 정국 방문 인증

places.desc_en: Shabu-shabu course restaurant. Jin and J-Hope visited together. 3 consecutive years Blue Ribbon Survey pick.
places.desc_kr: 진과 제이홉이 방문한 샤브샤브 맛집. 3년 연속 블루리본 서베이 선정

places.desc_en: RM's favorite museum in Samcheong-dong. The core of any 'RM Art Tour' in Seoul.
places.desc_kr: RM이 자주 방문하는 미술관. 'RM 미술관 투어' 핵심

places.desc_en: RM shared his visit to Kim Yun Shin exhibition on Instagram. A key gallery in Samcheong-dong.
places.desc_kr: RM이 김윤신 전시 관람 후 인스타 공유. 삼청동 핵심 갤러리

places.desc_en: RM posted about this hotteok stand multiple times on SNS. A symbol of RM's love for Samcheong-dong.
places.desc_kr: RM이 SNS에 여러 번 올린 호떡 맛집. RM의 삼청동 사랑

places.desc_en: The historic square where BTS held their ARIRANG comeback concert in March 2026!
places.desc_kr: 2026 BTS ARIRANG 컴백 라이브 공연 장소!

places.desc_en: Historic palace near IDOL MV filming areas. A must-visit Seoul landmark for all visitors.
places.desc_kr: IDOL MV 등 전통문화 컨셉 촬영지 인근. 서울 필수 관광지

places.desc_en: Iconic architecture by Zaha Hadid. BTS filming and fan event location. Beautiful night photo spot.
places.desc_kr: BTS 촬영 및 팬 이벤트 장소. 야경 포토존

places.desc_en: Premium pork BBQ visited by all BTS members. Only 4 cuts served, grilled over charcoal. Jungkook's solo dining here went viral.
places.desc_kr: BTS 전체가 방문한 삼겹살 맛집. 정국 혼밥으로도 화제

places.desc_en: Dense area of K-pop album and photocard shops in Myeongdong. Easy to find BTS albums and merch.
places.desc_kr: 명동 앨범/포카 매장 밀집 지역

places.desc_en: Suga's Love Yourself promotion was shot at the children's playground here.
places.desc_kr: 슈가 Love Yourself 촬영 (어린이놀이터)

places.desc_en: Abandoned amusement park. Filming location for ON MV and We Are Bulletproof Pt.2.
places.desc_kr: 폐놀이공원. ON MV / We Are Bulletproof Pt.2 촬영지

places.desc_en: Butter performance video filming location. Stunning Han River views through floor-to-ceiling windows.
places.desc_kr: Butter 퍼포먼스 비디오 촬영지. 한강 뷰

places.desc_en: Former oil depot turned cultural park. BTS MV and photo shoot location.
places.desc_kr: MV/화보 촬영지

places.desc_en: Featured frequently in BTS content. Beautiful night views. Yeouido and Banpo areas recommended.
places.desc_kr: BTS 콘텐츠에 자주 등장. 야경 추천 (여의도/반포)

places.desc_en: Location of BTS THE CITY ARIRANG drone show in 2026.
places.desc_kr: 2026 BTS THE CITY ARIRANG 드론쇼 장소

places.desc_en: Seoul's tallest building. BTS filming location and photo zone. Seoul Sky observatory on top.
places.desc_kr: BTS 촬영 및 포토존. 서울스카이 전망대
